title: Live probe runbook Windows console encoding note
problem: Ticket-074 fixed cp1252 stdout for probe-scratch-evidence-review markdown, but the operator runbook still documents PYTHONIOENCODING workarounds without noting the ASCII-safe formatter change.
acceptance_criteria: Runbook scratch evidence review section notes ASCII-safe markdown on Windows cp1252 consoles post ticket-074.
Documents --format json and --out as alternatives without implying PYTHONIOENCODING is required for default markdown.
non_goals: No CLI or formatter code changes.
No public export or site changes.
No broad encoding refactor across all commands.
